new_value: {"description":"Use hook stdout to inject system messages into Claude Code conversations. Examples: SessionStart shows hookwatch status + previous session summary, Stop shows session stats. Each message must identify its source hook (e.g. '[hookwatch:SessionStart] ...'). Explore all hook event types for useful context injection. Constraint: messages must be concise and not block normal user experience. Test which fields are most useful. v0 or v1 depending on complexity."}

new_value: {"description":"Shared secret token for handler-server auth. Deferred to v5 — any file-readable secret is defeatable by attacker with filesystem access. If attacker has local filesystem access, hookwatch is not the primary threat. Revisit if hookwatch ever serves non-localhost.","notes":"v5+ deferral per user decision during Red Team analysis"}
old_value: {"id":"ch-bl4","title":"Shared secret token for handler→server authentication","description":"On startup, Bun server writes a random token to ~/.local/share/hookwatch/.token. Handler reads it and includes in POST headers (Authorization: Bearer \u003ctoken\u003e). Prevents port hijacking where a malicious local process binds port 6004 and intercepts hook event payloads containing potential secrets. Cheap to implement, low severity but good hygiene.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dev@pablolion.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T13:34:55Z","created_by":"Pablo LION","updated_at":"2026-03-04T13:34:55Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ch-8t0","title":"Fix duplicate warnings on startup — resolve should not warn","description":"On startup, both detect (startup matcher) and resolve (* matcher) fire. If settings are missing or vars are incomplete, both emit warnings — user sees two messages. Fix: resolve-session-env.sh should exit silently on errors instead of emitting warnings. Detect handles all user-facing warnings. Resolve's job is only to write exports to CLAUDE_ENV_FILE.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"dev@pablolion.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:00:07Z","created_by":"Pablo LION","updated_at":"2026-03-04T19:00:07Z"}

{"id":"ch-1zt","title":"Emphasize directory-moved message in detect script","description":"The directory-moved warning in detect-session-env.sh should be more emphatic, matching the tone of the missing-vars warning.
